scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,desktop -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.prod:desktop: npm run build -w frontend && npm run start -w desktop
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:push -w backend && npm run db:seed
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
